description_long: This object consists of two cylindrical smart speaker units, one tall and one short, both with a matte black finish and a perforated speaker grille covering the lower half of the taller unit. The top surfaces of both units feature a circular LED light ring, with a central area that likely contains touch-sensitive controls and a microphone. The taller unit has a subtle Amazon logo near its base, while the shorter unit appears to be a detachable or companion device. The speaker grille is composed of evenly spaced circular perforations, giving it a modern, high-tech appearance. The overall design is sleek and minimalist, with no visible buttons or screens, emphasizing touch or voice interaction. Both units are designed to blend seamlessly into contemporary urban environments, such as homes, offices, or public spaces.
description: A sleek, matte black cylindrical smart speaker system with a perforated grille and glowing LED ring, featuring both a tall main unit and a smaller companion device.
description_view_0: Front view showing both the tall main speaker and the smaller companion unit, with the Amazon logo visible on both bases.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the smooth, unbroken surface of the tall speaker and the top surfaces of both units, with the LED ring illuminated.
description_view_2: Angled side view displaying the perforated grille and the relative size difference between the two units.
description_view_3: Back view of the tall speaker, showing the continuous matte surface and the absence of visible controls or ports.
attribute_brand_logo: A small 'amazon' logo in white text is visible near the base of both the tall and short units.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: The speaker grille features a uniform pattern of small, circular perforations arranged in a grid, covering the lower half of the tall unit.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The top surface of each unit contains a circular touch-sensitive area, likely with integrated microphone and LED ring, but no visible physical buttons or labels.
